---
title: "The Ven. Hopkins Badnell"
---

## The Ven. Hopkins Badnell

**Dates:** (fl.1864)

### Description

Archdeacon of George, then of the Cape, later Bishop of Capetown

### Biography

CMY sent her books to him.

### Letters

- Letter from Sept 3d 1864

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
